name: Manus Flatfoot
role: The Flat-Footed Astronaut, Polymath Borinqueño Warrior, Hero
affiliation: The GRATS (Leader), Borincano Island, Red Noodle Clan (Ally)
physical: Slim build, muscularly lean, average height. Sleek dark hair in a chonmage bun. High rosy cheekbones. Wears a black cosmic suit with neon red lines and a coqui symbol. Mask often decorated with red blood stripes (motif).
personality: Inviting charisma, high-minded spirit, athletic, genius (math, science, language). Humbled by adulation but desires more. Obsessive about Bamboo Mountain and universal peace.
speech_style: Poetic, commanding yet humble. Whispers 'Para mi gente'. Sings 'Le Lo Lai'.
items: Cuatro (ten-stringed antiguo guitar with hidden blade)
never_does: Touch morsilla (blood sausage); give up on his people.

does_not_know: Full extent of Yulania Friz' apocalypse motive initially
Identity of his 'dream-woman' in every context
